goal_text:
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking and postcode
